race.comment: It's hard to knock the form of CRYPTOLINI (6) who put back-to-back wins together here before being given further time to mature. Has been given a couple of easy trials in preparation for this and can continue on his winning ways. LUTON HOO (7) resumes here but the form she showed when last in work was good enough for a race of this nature. Can feature while fresh. SUPERHERO (10) will be rock-hard fit for this and should find this easier than recent efforts in town. Top-three aspirations. KATDEEL (5) has two wins and a second from three spins around this circuit and gets some weight relief with the 2kg claim. In the mix. WARILLA GORILLA (9) next best despite the sticky draw.
